creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #33)
> Please, don't keep NEW PORT bugs hanging. Either close, move to a separate
> bug or assign to the next responsible (portmgr?).

Actually, aren't we wanting for fk to implement your comments anyway?
